evals.prompt: Build a 5-email trial sequence for our project management SaaS. Trial is 14 days.
evals.expected_output: Should apply the trial-to-paid sequence framework. Should produce 5 emails with timing relative to trial start. Should include subject line, preview text, email body, and CTA for each email. Each email should have one clear goal. Email 4 (3 days before expiry) should emphasize what they'll lose. Email 5 should be an urgency-driven last chance email.
assertions: Each email has subject line and preview text
